name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Will you let me explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
This is a long email, but I hope you'll take the time to read it all. In just a minute, I will ask you to make a donation before tonight's fundraising deadline. But first, I'd like to give you an explanation.
Washington is broken. And my opponent, Cory Gardner, is one of the biggest reasons why. Time and again, he has voted in lockstep with Mitch McConnell's right-wing agenda. He refuses to stand up to the president, even when it's wrong for his constituents.
**That's why I'm running to replace Gardner with the strong, independent leadership Colorado deserves -- especially during a crisis like this. Because while the masks are new, hard times aren't.** [**So I'm humbly asking, will you join us and donate $3 to help flip this Colorado Senate seat blue?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc46d/2a380d31/23cf1e06/f0992a/2389823021/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MjJfTVdINEpIX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200522_MWH4JH_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between John Hickenlooper and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc46d/2a380d31/23cf1e06/f0992b/2389823021/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MjJfTVdINEpIX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200522_MWH4JH_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc46d/2a380d31/23cf1e06/f09914/2389823021/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MjJfTVdINEpIX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRaUI5ZlE9PSI6IjI1In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200522_MWH4JH_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc46d/2a380d31/23cf1e06/f09915/2389823021/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MjJfTVdINEpIX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVReUI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200522_MWH4JH_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc46d/2a380d31/23cf1e06/f09916/2389823021/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MjJfTVdINEpIX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200522_MWH4JH_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
When I was governor, we brought all sorts of people together and helped Colorado recover from some of the most devastating floods and wildfires in the state's history. We united in the aftermath of one of the country's worst mass shootings. And our economy grew stronger than any other state in the nation.
Mitch McConnell is afraid of our campaign because he knows we would try to put an end to the special interests running rampant in Washington. His allies are dumping nearly $12 million into Colorado to prop up Gardner, attack my character, and distort my record.
I know we have what it takes to win this race and make real change for the people of Colorado -- but only if we have the resources to dispel the GOP's attacks on our campaign. So, I'm turning to you now:
[**I'm personally asking you to split a donation between our campaign and Senator Maggie Hassan's before tonight's fundraising deadline. Without your support, we won't be able to respond to the incoming attacks, and our campaign will be at risk.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc46d/2a380d31/23cf1e06/f0992a/2389823021/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MjJfTVdINEpIX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200522_MWH4JH_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
As we begin to pull our country out of this crisis, the American people deserve leaders who will put everyday families, small businesses, and workers first -- not big corporations, their wealthy buddies, or even themselves.
I'm running to be that leader. I'm confident we will win this election and get our country back on track -- but only with your help.
That's why your donation matters so much right now.
Thank you for all you do,
John Hickenlooper
U.S. Senate candidate, Colorado
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc46d/2a380d31/23cf1e06/f0992a/2389823021/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MjJfTVdINEpIX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200522_MWH4JH_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

body:
I have some big news for you, straight from the Oval Office itself! President Trump is officially on board Team Scheller, as he announced via Twitter: Peter, I have some big news for you, straight from the Oval Office itself!
President Trump is officially on board Team Scheller, as he announced via Twitter: [ ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=347693345fd64bb1a6d1c8eac47652d0&_e=fp-T5RbQeIwHdiWAyYwfALXDOYdw6FAFmn2vKHYreVtZR7ZHSnAGJteAmwI4C0CRr3N4EQ7XYm8UKj6tInePQnZel23dj_Rh11H02uBP8pzErxVBTT56vRf46bcHh0bVz3RPZAKL835G0l2zJ9f-NL5n4H-rwTLc7yXmWdy_JzkyPLMt26epytpstMliOq5JMkFjh0Z7fYlJlmtcGsz07eRUjrfr1RLceZ_o8IYlu9Mq26N-BxBTsAjW-46KPUXWJvqHYk1bL7y4tRIHILCjRm3_TUFfiiHPNchXbbfOyTfVwAdr2qniU3aVlU0sQDdFI-msmJ-TL8fJrqU2Co2A20DqPZISZbgFsY2uA2Cmlxj8AEZrv3SUjkUT70zt-9DwJ_u43ewg3UhezVOxPkAfx0sCoJ8bxfX3SMgyvs7zNTDwSHUEOJJhaODr44gEPSJAlU3WjIlme9jCOGSuxshmVg%3D%3D) Peter, this is a huge day for our campaign and President Trump knows he needs more allies in Congress to end the politicial games of Nancy Pelosi and Susan Wild.

Now, as this deadly virus swept the world, I’m standing with our president to deliver much-needed relief. I’m proud to support him as he puts America first and SAVES LIVES.

That means working across the aisle to deliver relief for Pennsylvania small businesses and families.
That means standing up for our values, and making sure that dangerous leftist policies like Medicare for All and sanctuary cities never see the light of day in our state.

Starting today, there’s exactly 1 month left — 744 hours — until the primary. We plan to work harder than ever to grow this progressive moment and make sure Kentuckians know that Charles is our best chance to defeat Mitch.
#
Starting today, there’s exactly 1 month left until the primary.
That’s 31 days until we decide who will be our Democratic challenger against Mitch McConnell.
**We plan on spending the next 744 hours working harder than ever to grow this progressive moment and make sure Kentuckians know that Charles is our best chance to defeat Mitch. **
But if we want to be ambitious in our work, we need the resources to match. So today, _we’re launching a 24-hour fundraising drive to raise $7,440. _
**[It’s critical we raise $7,440 today if we want to make sure our campaign can execute on our plan to win and stay on track with our big end-of-month goal. Can you chip in $7.40 or whatever spare change you have to help out?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17599679/199843121/198088408?refcode=em20200523&amount=7.40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGQxYWU4NS1mOTljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h7797wWvSr2G7Qg4S18DD6dLkZflBEvTz4OACVQIALA=)**

There’s a lot of work left to do if we want to pull off a grassroots victory on June 23.
Especially in a competitive primary like this, it’s critical we invest as much as we can into our video ads campaigns, voter outreach, and volunteer programs for the next month.
Giving $7.40 might not seem like it would make a big difference in funding our operations, but there’s so much power when we put our donations together.
**This movement was built by teachers, coal miners, plumbers, fast-food workers, students, and believers in change who came together and chipped in whatever they can afford to show their support. So please don’t ever doubt how much of a difference your donation can make.**
If you want to make universal health care, economic justice, and defeating Mitch McConnell a reality — it’s critical you give your support now when it really matters.
**[Can you chip in to our 24-hour fundraising goal and help us raise $7,440 today? We’re relying on supporters like you to make sure our campaign has the funds to compete and close the gap in this primary in the next month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17599681/199843123/198088408?refcode=em20200523&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGQxYWU4NS1mOTljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h7797wWvSr2G7Qg4S18DD6dLkZflBEvTz4OACVQIALA=)**

Team Booker

---
Dear Friend, Before the pandemic hit, public trust in the federal government was at 17%. I'm quite sure if that poll were taken now, trust would be at or below the all-time low of 15%. It's no wonder. The American people were asked to make great sacrifices to buy time to build the capability to execute a managed re-opening while controlling the spread of the virus. That sacrifice has been squandered. We are barely more capable of broad-scale testing/tracing/isolation than we were three months ago. But the administration and the Republican Party have declared "Mission Accomplished!" Meanwhile, the stimulus checks are spent, enhanced unemployment benefits will expire at the end of July, Congress is back to its gridlocked self, favoring Wall Street and abandoning Main Street, and the virus is still killing our fellow Americans. It's time to shatter the status-quo. It's time to elect people who will fight for __our__ interests and are dedicated to re-earning our trust. **We must Demand Better from our elected officials. [If you agree, please pitch in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17599736/199848075/-1907457919?refcode=052320_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzgxNTY3YS1mYjljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zF0soxVAdGE6A-cAPDnhVklN0-4zfYYnCnXdjNBivCs=) and help. clean_body: | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is running to flip the open seat in the 17th District.= Dear Friend, Before the pandemic hit, public trust in the federal government was at 17%. I'm quite sure if that poll were taken now, trust would be at or below the all-time low of 15%. It's no wonder. The American people were asked to make great sacrifices to buy time to build the capability to execute a managed re-opening while controlling the spread of the virus. That sacrifice has been squandered. We are barely more capable of broad-scale testing/tracing/isolation than we were three months ago. But the administration and the Republican Party have declared "Mission Accomplished!" Meanwhile, the stimulus checks are spent, enhanced unemployment benefits will expire at the end of July, Congress is back to its gridlocked self, favoring Wall Street and abandoning Main Street, and the virus is still killing our fellow Americans. It's time to shatter the status-quo. It's time to elect people who will fight for our interests and are dedicated to re-earning our trust. We must Demand Better from our elected officials. = and help. We can do this - together. If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | =** Thank you, and stay safe. Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Mike
subject: Pelosi Allies Launch Nearly Quarter Million Dollar Ad Blitz Supporting Yvette Herrell (NM-02)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE DATE: May 22, 2020 CONTACT: Mike Berg PHONE: (614) 678-1909 EMAIL: [mike@clairechase.org](mailto:mike@clairechase.org)
---
| Pelosi Allies Launch Nearly Quarter Million Dollar Ad Blitz Supporting Yvette Herrell
ROSWELL, NM - Today Patriot Majority - a Democrat Super PAC aligned with Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and pro-abortion activists - launched hundreds of thousands of dollars in [attack ads](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byulPQuOfY__wakfIewRsbDxD5XakgjQUqf-UrU6VgHew5m5biKnnHrfpYgLukpsVai3f93MHJ1FjBFKEBtP9p9rOGk0xziySBiN840sq-gjzK2aIC_dRD2EVqurgjR9-LcBc6bkajFG5FT8tskSvA_cIdq0emcdqhnZdgmkjncCtSS_TCddwUEuuPC_wSsAcu6Eh7V_N0UBwtYRJSP3Ha1ARDbVqiYFdBvJZ1oiyAYHW1CakU6zXA==&c=nLDTmFKpLyu6XTmBeNYdzKRtwniYTn6FVbWI0pBCHLIWAC_Cz9wjaQ==&ch=Iu_CZLWVYYbGzXZqTlrSPjsd4U2R64s1vKd2QGCjWO62nn7af3sv6g==) against Claire Chase and supporting Yvette Herrell in the final days of the competitive Republican primary in New Mexico CD2. Patriot Majority has a [history](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byulPQuOfY__wakfIewRsbDxD5XakgjQUqf-UrU6VgHew5m5biKnnHrfpYgLukps1NadwFO5HD2o2fxvu60fvLi3R45eKpg-TpGo8t7XDk3BmUurWi8_7eZHfPf-7EBxhlnnz9OjQLB0iY1Dj0KkMZAdOWb0vxS71heVLyU7lCG0JWd2-qrATr9XjjbclN5ukjLi0VfrhrJHervMFJAMkYerL7frMTN2tBBlQP0cy_U=&c=nLDTmFKpLyu6XTmBeNYdzKRtwniYTn6FVbWI0pBCHLIWAC_Cz9wjaQ==&ch=Iu_CZLWVYYbGzXZqTlrSPjsd4U2R64s1vKd2QGCjWO62nn7af3sv6g==) of meddling in GOP primaries and is attempting to boost Herrell because they view her as a deeply flawed general election candidate.
Chase Campaign Manager Mike Berg said, "These Nancy Pelosi allies clearly view Yvette Herrell as weak and unelectable. They're trying to drag her across the finish line so they can beat her again. Every Republican should condemn these Pelosi allies for meddling in our primary."
This is the same [playbook ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byulPQuOfY__wakfIewRsbDxD5XakgjQUqf-UrU6VgHew5m5biKnnHrfpYgLukps8GN_CXi2NLRdriaIYhnCg73I_r_xjl74OQxC-CRPZdlPywZ0OdwgZdpRpU90C-FvrZ3TL5ZiGScqDnUcXTrc25Q_XbiQdvyhsrJkChfRRhboXtKPeVBOY59eLZ2Hw0fUvfGW502_Lkt6X2FSjneI3WLdoZ1ncNoV3AJ2rQ4kI4QCnpxsdcy4uuAL0Z9PG-bF40-x1YXRuzSJYIcksjQjxI3hSCtA2gf6&c=nLDTmFKpLyu6XTmBeNYdzKRtwniYTn6FVbWI0pBCHLIWAC_Cz9wjaQ==&ch=Iu_CZLWVYYbGzXZqTlrSPjsd4U2R64s1vKd2QGCjWO62nn7af3sv6g==)Democrats used to help Todd Akin (Mo.) and Sharron Angle (Nev.) win their primaries. Both candidates went on to lose in general elections.
The Chase campaign responded to the "Patriot Majority" ad by releasing an ad pointing out the fact that D.C. liberals are willing to invest hundreds of thousands of dollars in Yvette Herrell to make sure she is the nominee.
Watch the ad [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byulPQuOfY__wakfIewRsbDxD5XakgjQUqf-UrU6VgHew5m5biKnnHrfpYgLukps247e6Ph62aJWQppswjt_mKzFnFTbljeoAqlwUonjC3E4HuzQ2yEQ_c5BwNp_HOHZ1XaONl-L7EhNBVIeUXmg7fCkMjTvkiUVF0IdPn3BcX0bCWTp1LzpnCHJB1_-1n6KX_NTJO8GsvI=&c=nLDTmFKpLyu6XTmBeNYdzKRtwniYTn6FVbWI0pBCHLIWAC_Cz9wjaQ==&ch=Iu_CZLWVYYbGzXZqTlrSPjsd4U2R64s1vKd2QGCjWO62nn7af3sv6g==):
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byulPQuOfY__wakfIewRsbDxD5XakgjQUqf-UrU6VgHew5m5biKnnHrfpYgLukps247e6Ph62aJWQppswjt_mKzFnFTbljeoAqlwUonjC3E4HuzQ2yEQ_c5BwNp_HOHZ1XaONl-L7EhNBVIeUXmg7fCkMjTvkiUVF0IdPn3BcX0bCWTp1LzpnCHJB1_-1n6KX_NTJO8GsvI=&c=nLDTmFKpLyu6XTmBeNYdzKRtwniYTn6FVbWI0pBCHLIWAC_Cz9wjaQ==&ch=Iu_CZLWVYYbGzXZqTlrSPjsd4U2R64s1vKd2QGCjWO62nn7af3sv6g==)
---
| BACKGROUND ON WHO FUNDS PATRIOT MAJORITY
Patriot Majority Is A Liberal Group Funded By Allies Of Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer's Super PAC, and Pro-Abortion Group "Women Vote!"
Patriot majority is a liberal/Democrat group. ([Fact Check.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byulPQuOfY__wakfIewRsbDxD5XakgjQUqf-UrU6VgHew5m5biKnnHrfpYgLukpst1E4u3cukfzux7p2ACnuVkJXvRKwfoI2n-i5BbUNFdWRBByW3B_4hT_pn0usPAlRsUxwIF-avNq3-FfTKVHoi02DzvuIbtQkJ4QMpBP7DdpwhS4APov-G9cVuwEbvxAe2tIcpvNGqSv8o323moE1w0UICMzOq6E2&c=nLDTmFKpLyu6XTmBeNYdzKRtwniYTn6FVbWI0pBCHLIWAC_Cz9wjaQ==&ch=Iu_CZLWVYYbGzXZqTlrSPjsd4U2R64s1vKd2QGCjWO62nn7af3sv6g==), 9/3/14)
Patriot Majority is funded by Sixteen Thirty Fund. "Tax documents on CitizenAudit.org reviewed by Issue One show that Patriot Majority USA has, in recent years, also received money from the Sixteen Thirty Fund and NEO Philanthropy Action Fund." ([Issue One](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byulPQuOfY__wakfIewRsbDxD5XakgjQUqf-UrU6VgHew5m5biKnnHrfpYgLukpsZRioTtHrCWu2TAWSFJmXZ7-b5lUlY3oIde-UKU-8-XEAViiWXZIcj_WeWA1SeDATRbVplp4JVGolQUkouTWw0pWM8XmHtBu8A11qT7PZRevzlvVTzvvZeCWN4TUKXLobys7HgoMuK2M=&c=nLDTmFKpLyu6XTmBeNYdzKRtwniYTn6FVbWI0pBCHLIWAC_Cz9wjaQ==&ch=Iu_CZLWVYYbGzXZqTlrSPjsd4U2R64s1vKd2QGCjWO62nn7af3sv6g==), 6/29/17)

* Sixteen Thirty Fund spent millions to help Nancy Pelosi take over the House. " A network of secret-money nonprofit groups has spent millions of dollars attacking swing-seat House Republicans on health care and taxes, quietly becoming one of the biggest players in the 2018 political landscape. The groups have local members and names like Floridians for a Fair Shake, Michigan Families for Economic Prosperity and North Carolinians for a Fair Economy. But they are all linked to one obscure nonprofit in downtown Washington, D.C.: the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which has funneled millions of dollars to progressive causes in recent years and set up each of the new groups, according to D.C. corporation records." ([Politico](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byulPQuOfY__wakfIewRsbDxD5XakgjQUqf-UrU6VgHew5m5biKnnHrfpYgLukpsT712--1uoE3GJ9588NwNUNFiXucYICvPXDFA8GhTeL_ka4MfGKC3JcXH5xdHuYM4C9aHyiI0vH_mrOqtonG-CXo5z2ycJxAvSJ0DJV-EPBa79o5fNteZEp_IvIuoYSEHzUTFf80Cdv0jOj72Bu6dBsqQN92ijBr1&c=nLDTmFKpLyu6XTmBeNYdzKRtwniYTn6FVbWI0pBCHLIWAC_Cz9wjaQ==&ch=Iu_CZLWVYYbGzXZqTlrSPjsd4U2R64s1vKd2QGCjWO62nn7af3sv6g==), 11/19/19)

Patriot Majority Has Received Funding From Senate Majority PAC. ([Federal Election Commission](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byulPQuOfY__wakfIewRsbDxD5XakgjQUqf-UrU6VgHew5m5biKnnHrfpYgLukpseZaJs5QO6Q4SM026JfthIz5V53e0o8InXziYoHMzOMTZmrojhWCk2B6BdKIMX294nIuRpIcIhwezyA1nrUBXtWUcnWZqoPRHzr4a0RRAnajSXBWMEcgQ1BXP2pWvXBht&c=nLDTmFKpLyu6XTmBeNYdzKRtwniYTn6FVbWI0pBCHLIWAC_Cz9wjaQ==&ch=Iu_CZLWVYYbGzXZqTlrSPjsd4U2R64s1vKd2QGCjWO62nn7af3sv6g==), 1/13/14)

* Senate Majority PAC is Chuck Schumer's Super PAC. "Senate Majority PAC, the super PAC aligned with Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, raised $61 million in 2019, a record sum that will boost Democrats as they seek to recapture the Senate this year." ([Politico](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byulPQuOfY__wakfIewRsbDxD5XakgjQUqf-UrU6VgHew5m5biKnnHrfpYgLukps5mdBJEl56sW_R8VV2yXyeE8tF5Rprc0DD5x-GQns38-q_vRlosCSwh-aIn45wk7Bsv3wTSD_aPA9bwIzvCUcyKuMl0KhZETgH6wjQu51TjJGlchEoTMEe7Bt9LxFNj89lPwNLHf2EXp5Oe6ktgkvpyRl010ZU9pDfE_bO05fxum1Tiaa7gQ5hw==&c=nLDTmFKpLyu6XTmBeNYdzKRtwniYTn6FVbWI0pBCHLIWAC_Cz9wjaQ==&ch=Iu_CZLWVYYbGzXZqTlrSPjsd4U2R64s1vKd2QGCjWO62nn7af3sv6g==), 1/28/20)

Patriot Majority Has Received Funding From Women Vote! ([Federal Election Commission](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byulPQuOfY__wakfIewRsbDxD5XakgjQUqf-UrU6VgHew5m5biKnnHrfpYgLukpswpuqSsu3YlU9Q5HfwMcYDxBjfZMWq49clxjG9Ed3H-tGwPVgKnp5uO3DKRH6fED8SXlKGyAZ-PL_CR8DJDgrYeEhcQElt6aC40_lQmcBh3jbUjBcjikj0KwA8bll-3tzozI9GLV0_qE=&c=nLDTmFKpLyu6XTmBeNYdzKRtwniYTn6FVbWI0pBCHLIWAC_Cz9wjaQ==&ch=Iu_CZLWVYYbGzXZqTlrSPjsd4U2R64s1vKd2QGCjWO62nn7af3sv6g==), 10/4/18)

* Women Vote! is solely dedicated to electing women that support abortion. "Emily's List and Women Vote! are affiliated political action committees devoted to electing Democratic women candidates who support a legal right to abortion. Both operate from the same offices in Washington, D.C." ([Factcheck.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byulPQuOfY__wakfIewRsbDxD5XakgjQUqf-UrU6VgHew5m5biKnnHrfpYgLukpsREiFAPBJnF5WuZcKFMkDjs76axptXze6hX2yzXsM_QylqhinC8SXdhwR4NE6x_PdpyXK-THd29kdas4fqzCTbKK1IoC-E-2phrtANrGOqtSanjHvKUf0crbWeYiyhU481JlPRZjWIec=&c=nLDTmFKpLyu6XTmBeNYdzKRtwniYTn6FVbWI0pBCHLIWAC_Cz9wjaQ==&ch=Iu_CZLWVYYbGzXZqTlrSPjsd4U2R64s1vKd2QGCjWO62nn7af3sv6g==), 6/19/18)

Peter, **The news about vote-by-mail has been a whirlwind.** We want every Texan to cast their ballot safely. For the last two months, we’ve been fighting to expand vote-by-mail to everyone: winning the support of state legislators, earning media articles, calling thousands of voters and spreading the word. Our take-home message: vote-by-mail is the best way to protect public health and our democracy. The Texas Attorney General has fought us at every turn. In April, Texas Democrats won a state court lawsuit, but the GOP Texas Supreme Court stopped the decision from taking effect. This week, we again won a lawsuit, this time in federal court — and again a conservative appellate court stopped the decision. **One thing is for certain — Democrats are working to protect our right to vote and Republicans are working to suppress it.** Here’s what Ken Paxton and Texas Republicans know: COVID-19 is a threat to every Texan and voting in-person puts people at risk. But they also know that when everyone is able to vote, the GOP will lose. [**We need the resources to take on the Texas GOP and Ken Paxton to defend the right to vote of every Texan. I am ready to fight this fight in DC. name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Take Our Poll
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Do you believe NYC should begin lifting restrictions to reopen our economy?
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=161A216A1A2772)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

I want to share a quick update on a few of the things that would benefit our community.

As Governor Cuomo’s mandated shutdown for New York City extends, it’s critical that we [resume elective surgeries and preventive procedures](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=161A216A1A2773) across the ENTIRE state.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=161A216A1A2773)
---
| | |
---
| | Yesterday, Dana Perino and I discussed the [devastating effect of Governor Cuomo’s Executive Order on nursing homes](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=161A216A1A2774). We must continue to demand an independent investigation.

In addition, I recently [spoke on Fox Business](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=161A216A1A2775) about my calls to reopen certain NYC industries now, including the construction and home improvement. Here on Staten Island, we have already met the Governor’s metrics but are unable to enter Phase One because we are part of the city. My colleagues and I have written to the Governor asking that he unleash Staten Island.

---
| | |
---
| | Do you believe NYC should begin lifting restrictions to reopen our economy?

---
| | | | | | |
---
| | | [ YES ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=161A216A1A2781)
---
| | | | | [ NO ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=161A216A1A2782)
---
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | During the course of the COVID-19 outbreak in NYC, our team has delivered thousands of pieces of personal protection equipment (PPE) and supplies to area hospitals, nursing homes and long term care facilities. As time continues, the needs change weekly. Right now, our hospitals and healthcare facilities are in need of medical gowns. I’m proud to have [identified a local manufacturing operation](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=161A216A1A2777) in Brooklyn to produce disposable isolation gowns.

Of the many things that are in need in our community, food has also been a necessity. This is why I’ve [co-sponsored weekly food drives](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=161A216A1A2778) in order to fill church pantries across the district. It’s truly remarkable to see our community come together in times of need and it’s what makes our community so great. Days ago, I spoke up after my constituents received rotten food and molded bread [pushing the city to end contracts with two vendors](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=161A216A1A2779). Special thanks to the JCC and Project Hospitality for delivering fresh groceries and prepared food to these senior citizens.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=161A216A1A2780)
---
| | |
---
| | As we approach Memorial Day, one of my greatest honors was to present St. Nicholas Home with an [American flag and POW/MIA flag](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=161A216A1A2780).

I hope you have a safe Memorial Day as we honor the men and women who died while serving our country.

Sincerely,

---
| |
---
| | Nicole Malliotakis

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The only way we win against the GOP's millions is by building a grassroots team strong enough to take them on.
| | |
---
Friend, this is big: Experts from CNN to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight are now reporting that Democrats CAN take back the Senate this year - and election analysts say it will all come down to Georgia.
**But we have a major problem:** My Republican opponent - a former Wall Street exec who's been cashing in on her public office - is pouring $20 MILLION of her own fortune into this race to buy this seat. She just launched a massive TV ad blitz attacking Democrats and propping up her campaign. And it gets worse: POLITICO reports that Mitch McConnell is lining up "the full backing of the Republican establishment" to help my opponent win and tighten his grip on the Senate.
Friend, here's the deal: I don't have a giant personal war chest to fund my campaign, and I don't have an army of GOP megadonors ready to swoop in when the going gets tough. What I do have is grassroots supporters like you - people who believe in restoring moral leadership to Washington and are willing to fight tooth and nail to make the change they want to see in the world.
Right now we're in a dead heat with our Republican opponent - but if we don't pick up the grassroots momentum now and counter our opponent's ad blitz, we'll fall behind and lose this race.
**That 's why we need to raise $15,000 by midnight tomorrow, and I'm counting on you to rush your urgent grassroots support: [_Will you give $5 or more now to help our people-powered campaign flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e793/288179be/bdadf97/348ea50e/4040073135/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjM4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk238-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") The only way we win against the GOP's millions is by building a grassroots team strong enough to take them on.**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e793/288179be/bdadf97/348ea50e/4040073135/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjM4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk238-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth - in fact, I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. If you'd told me that one day I'd earn a college degree, serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and run for U.S. Senate, I never would've believed you.
But the truth is, the opportunities that made my journey possible - from Kayton Homes to Dr. King's pulpit - are growing further and further out of reach for too many people across this country. It's unjust, and I'm running for Senate to change that. But I simply can't do it without you.
**[_We have a real shot at flipping Georgia blue, but it 's going to take all of us coming together in the next six months to make it happen. So please, friend: Give $5 or more - by tomorrow's midnight deadline - to flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and restore moral leadership to Washington!_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e793/288179be/bdadf97/348ea50e/4040073135/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjM4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk238-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Reverend Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e793/288179be/bdadf97/348ea50e/4040073135/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjM4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk238-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Republican Voter Alert
subject: Associated Press: Dem super PAC pushes ‘weak’ GOP US House primary candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dem super PAC pushes 'weak' GOP US House primary candidate Associated Press Russell Contreras 5/21/2020 [https://apnews.com/27c519ffe6f126c38e0017b822d3ee22](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019l5RnZOgYXlFBLoxyhBjbfs1nLPO1OkLktN0YvyvTPVIV6rfDoBkhoNWrrmZr0h3obCq59lRURTvKEXGxlVmZ7l-T99sR0Lv-Nhps4WUTWi0ubAGPj-ROqnXIR_wE1TXDAN2MAEfDcwQPyOMRWdh3tc4lrnV9QbmwQ4IRlRS0KmJJ9FUFem88A==&c=0ctU52_-zu0xWTPWs9UFH4sWNqOA7_w_rEyUdDpEE9IO3VA6XjQanQ==&ch=Gw2RTTYMCv7EYsISzjBGgxJ-LTEczgqTFV44OKouSPZNR5Ffp2_YSQ==)
RIO RANCHO, N.M. (AP) -- A liberal super PAC is jumping into a New Mexico contested GOP U.S. House primary and running commercials in apparent support of a President Donald Trump ally that Democrats believe they can defeat in November.
Patriot Majority PAC began airing television commercials Saturday attacking oil executive Claire Chase for previous critical social media posts about Trump while praising former state lawmaker Yvette Herrell for supporting Trump's border wall.
"There's Santa Fe lobbyist Claire Chase who opposed President Trump, calling him an (expletive) unworthy of the office," a voice says while pictures of Chase are aired. "Or there's Yvette Herrell. She's 100% loyal to Trump, backed by 11 pro-gun sheriffs and Cowboys for Trump."
The ad urges Republican voters to "make a better choice."
Polls have shown that Republican voters remain strong supporters of Trump and the three-way GOP U.S. House primary race has centered around candidates expressing their loyalty to the president.
Spending reports reviewed by The Associated Press show that Patriot Majority PAC bought nearly $200,000 of ads to influence Republican voters in New Mexico's 2nd Congressional District primary on June 2.
The Center for Public Integrity said Patriot Majority PAC was founded by veteran Democratic Party operative Craig Varoga in 2009 to support Democratic candidates.
The ad comes as Democrats have expressed fears that Chase would be a tougher candidate for Democratic U.S. Rep. Xochitl Torres Small in the historic Republican-leaning district along the U.S.-Mexico border. Since Chase announced her candidacy, Democrats have been working behind the scenes to discredit her among Republicans.
For example, in September, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee, the official campaign arm of the Democrats in the House of Representatives, immediately started sharing Chase's old Facebook post critical of Trump during the 2016 Republican presidential primary.
Chase has since apologized and said she voted for Trump in 2016.
Herrell lost to Torres Small in 2018 by fewer than 3,000 votes. She faced criticism from some Republicans for running a subpar campaign by refusing to debate Torres Small on television and avoiding media outlets like the AP.
A civil war within the Republican Party of New Mexico centered around personalities and various camps has helped foster an intense and sometimes nasty GOP U.S. House primary that Democrats now seek to exploit.
The Chase campaign immediately denounce the commercial by Patriot Majority PAC. "These Nancy Pelosi allies clearly view Yvette Herrell as weak and unelectable," Chase Campaign Manager Mike Berg said, referring to the Democratic House Speaker. "They're trying to drag her across the finish line so they can beat her again. Every Republican should condemn these Pelosi allies for meddling in our primary."
Chris Mathys, who is also seeking the GOP nomination to challenge Torres Small, said the people behind the Patriot Majority PAC were similar to those who have donated more than $3 million to Torres Small's campaign. "They believe (Herrell) will be easily defeated in the general election," Mathys said. "Yvette needs to demand the ads are canceled."
In a statement, Herrell said she saw the Patriot Majority PAC ad promoting her as "an attack" from liberals. "They know I am leading the Republican race and are already starting their general election attacks on me," she said. "Their liberal attacks won't work."
---
| ###
---
| [ClaireChase.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019l5RnZOgYXlFBLoxyhBjbfs1nLPO1OkLktN0YvyvTPVIV6rfDoBkhuKcEseaPfO_RNqGrgngbZv8RqqEquUN-TA88aZucSb6Ip6lxNyGYIbbUGB9WCR5lLEh8jS9D_87ush8EUFKIhgoojojBMUGSw==&c=0ctU52_-zu0xWTPWs9UFH4sWNqOA7_w_rEyUdDpEE9IO3VA6XjQanQ==&ch=Gw2RTTYMCv7EYsISzjBGgxJ-LTEczgqTFV44OKouSPZNR5Ffp2_YSQ==)

name: Steph (Team Steel)
subject: The future of the House Majority is in play
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Going up against the Democrats' cash flood, it's going to take all hands on deck to flip this top-targeted seat.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tBoVJDtNEvM6lo1EnokxEJxVUf8h-ftbJ5GOM2y089hWK6tNt9w13XZ2Bws_pb6YTQbNOMN-d_Jm7jzRP3KiECCHCfVidZ8pGcbJdi8W87DvHCbCezzu3HrFHE46pBf56-iVbmCJZ0x1zWlKTWR7jZ0SMj1S6lLidluWZZ6inuUiPL1NVxir4vfggva1iogw1MsvgBCVcACUuU99eU6HA4LynWIuOfCR6nJx8tXFabLbo3LxF4u7SHWjT2r95SnZcyw9FPVIHyDmwoBKrBY0ceGzvgo3v7gDppGG5q_-gMSb2NdCL7WxVoaXSkXG31FDAaKjCCJ8YlDQesJPqN_XdPZ5aov-hJeO5BDtlxSaeWH3jITB4HrPJSDYSi0ZxWEYVYhBvDFJ4HJaynPB-rJWOw==&c=6jUXkPoCLVDUfkQVfNMbi5RXOb1ZqD7KbkpIBw4OVkusbbNGN-Akng==&ch=jMPXibRNjtMO9yIaFMUoo1LaYgT6snb4A4q1qOgDm--Y9sys6Qbrkw==) **The good news:**
* Michelle Steel is California's leading taxpayer advocate. She's promised to fight against any tax increases and oppose all new taxes. She's returned over $400 million to taxpayers and proved she will put hard-working Americans first.
* The NRCC has named Michelle one of the TOP 7 candidates to flip a seat from BLUE to RED, in large part because of you, Friend, and the support of our dedicated grassroots team.
* POLITICO is calling this race a toss-up -- meaning it can go either way. This race will be decided by just a handful of votes, and what we do right now will go a long way to determining November's outcome. And right now, we have the momentum to win. _But..._

**The bad news:**
* Nancy Pelosi is determined to buy this seat out from under us. With the help of Michael Bloomberg, the Democrats' dark money machine, and outside dark money groups, they are prepared to spend millions to ensure this seat stays blue.

This will be a fight to the finish, Friend, and we won't stand a chance without your help. Going up against the Democrats' cash flood, it's going to take all hands on deck to flip this top-targeted seat.

Any chance of flipping the House red starts in this district. That's why I have to ask: [**Can you chip in whatever you can right now to flip this seat and the House RED?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tBoVJDtNEvM6lo1EnokxEJxVUf8h-ftbJ5GOM2y089hWK6tNt9w13XZ2Bws_pb6YTQbNOMN-d_Jm7jzRP3KiECCHCfVidZ8pGcbJdi8W87DvHCbCezzu3HrFHE46pBf56-iVbmCJZ0x1zWlKTWR7jZ0SMj1S6lLidluWZZ6inuUiPL1NVxir4vfggva1iogw1MsvgBCVcACUuU99eU6HA4LynWIuOfCR6nJx8tXFabLbo3LxF4u7SHWjT2r95SnZcyw9FPVIHyDmwoBKrBY0ceGzvgo3v7gDppGG5q_-gMSb2NdCL7WxVoaXSkXG31FDAaKjCCJ8YlDQesJPqN_XdPZ5aov-hJeO5BDtlxSaeWH3jITB4HrPJSDYSi0ZxWEYVYhBvDFJ4HJaynPB-rJWOw==&c=6jUXkPoCLVDUfkQVfNMbi5RXOb1ZqD7KbkpIBw4OVkusbbNGN-Akng==&ch=jMPXibRNjtMO9yIaFMUoo1LaYgT6snb4A4q1qOgDm--Y9sys6Qbrkw==)

Whether you're new to the team or been here since day one, thank you for all that you do.

Steph
Team Steel

subject: Biden, Schumer, and now, Abrams
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
An endorsement from Stacy Abrams means that John Hickenlooper's radical agenda is right in-line with the rest of the far-Left. Is this the kind of leadership that Coloradans want or deserve? And, do we need another leftwing yes-man for Schumer in the Senate?
_Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._

body:
This month has proved just how far the Democrats are willing to go to flip Iowa's Senate seat and gain the Senate Majority. And they're gaining serious momentum.
Friend,

This month has proved just how far the Democrats are willing to go to flip Iowa's Senate seat and gain the Senate Majority. And they're gaining serious momentum.

**First,** Chuck Schumer and National Democrats raised over $200,000 for Schumer's handpicked candidate in less than 24 hours.

**Then,** one by one the failed, far-Left 2020 Presidential socialists lined up to support Schumer's handpicked candidate, including Elizabeth Warren, Pete Buttigieg, and Kamala Harris.

**Now,** Schumer's handpicked candidate outraised our campaign in the final weeks before the June 2nd primary election.

I've said this before, but I'll say it again. Chuck Schumer and the Democrats will buy Iowa's Senate seat outright if we don't do something to stop them.

**[That's why I'm asking you to make a monthly commitment to our fight to protect Iowa's Senate seat.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YnycHQs4piuO2Q53HaXpvVzsMT_WbZPTv4EEQ3tW3VxuI6shwnTk9Zy7u8x5xFfzD0BXqbC90S2WXdSl58hEO_OJaVp9X9h2lD-wzop7O06jzji8uErc022s5Cy9wLupNc1M5LJMBSOsa56F9RNAot3FSqGmjPoL-UqXo9J97-9ACJD8SiqaPjpmiptPJRIzIJr87XmK3SpJM8gmu7vUc3UOYqgt2bvPlpVh5N6-NaMYUGECMvtbkenntUR5TgAZ7UeUFhAOr2T4NjMhuyhMXnWrcM_z45sD6uHh_wRCWvJrV961bOiVHRjYq4EMYlyL4gsH4z9pCTknateQ5QaV2wLUSafOw0vl&c=zUl9FWR0iPY-ZPBIe91yGXGZI_jKWaoz50vnL_MRtboY4MbfiQPoKg==&ch=Wg4_9-YrMglQfWemd_XpeqNnuwspiRBA3EGMrT4jZFVdKpxRowrEMg==) **We need a strong showing with our online contributions to take back the fundraising lead in this race, and we can't do it without your help.

clean_body: This month has proved just how far the Democrats are willing to go to flip Iowa's Senate seat and gain the Senate Majority. And they're gaining serious momentum. Friend, This month has proved just how far the Democrats are willing to go to flip Iowa's Senate seat and gain the Senate Majority. And they're gaining serious momentum. First, Chuck Schumer and National Democrats raised over $200,000 for Schumer's handpicked candidate in less than 24 hours. Then, one by one the failed, far-Left 2020 Presidential socialists lined up to support Schumer's handpicked candidate, including Elizabeth Warren, Pete Buttigieg, and Kamala Harris. Now, Schumer's handpicked candidate outraised our campaign in the final weeks before the June 2nd primary election. I've said this before, but I'll say it again. Chuck Schumer and the Democrats will buy Iowa's Senate seat outright if we don't do something to stop them. == We need a strong showing with our online contributions to take back the fundraising lead in this race, and we can't do it without your help. == we'll be able to reach our digital goals each month and ensure we have the resources necessary to compete with Chuck Schumer and his backing by the Democratic watches. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: What happened to Texas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn
body:
Friend, I've been hearing a lot of strange things about Texas lately....
First, I saw BETO O'ROURKE on a video call with Sleepy Joe Biden, promising Texans that they could BEAT my father and flip the entire state blue.
Then, I saw headlines like these, lumping Texas together with some of the most vulnerable races this year, and making bold predictions about what will go down in November... [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pSc2UpYFb5fDAY_zDnI8HDSboGndxmQjoocIhAv4vCmYBcAbFbiBiZxx8ehp8z7TeuZFyn8zr2WZ5ifAaU-qsPzHNGzwICIvmRWlPAVz6WVi9tjABNAxHKNhQZuhDaUKYhtcq3jN79skaKUcpxsRYYUdaQwAUUKGV7N9NEHVtq9rqI_sFs7zOArgocKTt9afawsEi_vHYqlrESn6IjK7Rsulkh64lbBiXXuEn18GrCIqdzTR2w7HB2aVCJB0s9QFs6dt7N_vDxPXw0Nd04tmhThvNvWKrIq1XYwrK4q3erJ9fWH5K-Tu7Z_fbI5PytzcJDf2vfciwRrxRHnuZFuzAPcyt3AoeJspDxwFzB_u1pE=&c=PpWHgE6d-yjRJ0LAudYV4iCklDH19C_upcYMYV2OqmXboEJVMXacng==&ch=E5FMzCj7ZzHbr6MD11NRvvKBcKkqY5MMJrH-IojPHtI6ZdKTcfr8_w==) | |

**Friend, what happened to Texas?**
I thought this was a bastion of conservative values. A deep red state. Trump Country.

Clearly, the Far-Left is motivated. In their heads, a blue Texas is theirs for the taking. But I happen to know for a fact that Senator John Cornyn is fighting back with all he's got.

He's Texas' best chance of staying RED, and keeping my father in the White House. But he needs your help if he's going to be successful... **[will you show me and Senator Cornyn that you're in this fight by chipping in $25 now? [**CHIP IN $10 = $30**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pSc2UpYFb5fDAY_zDnI8HDSboGndxmQjoocIhAv4vCmYBcAbFbiBie8xJFuHJEszLgkzBOz1555DDHfPLOwsGWLmwjFAKKLMriPqyhqliHnwA4Y4OhQ26XSoHws7N_SXkXeczAbUHGI-SJsU94leiNYVhY1o-cnf3EKuMOGc4sDptwQsKEpkeg0mzY668VWPpUV-mkyZSwWzt_mCFAGS06IYgiLhcJg4VOoTAukMpzNmSW4nAU6bSJ6y7qagBglmS1OVNAwdHlfngiopjbbdA5YSI7db3EfU_1-vlU8AGW0GREpGmY_kO_BjAlIZEQWZ27fa1sVh2HqdmvWEPOqrfTtB2RQuvy8L4awIgvDUEYeeok_9G4xwtRA9cChwZrXo&c=PpWHgE6d-yjRJ0LAudYV4iCklDH19C_upcYMYV2OqmXboEJVMXacng==&ch=E5FMzCj7ZzHbr6MD11NRvvKBcKkqY5MMJrH-IojPHtI6ZdKTcfr8_w==)
[**CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pSc2UpYFb5fDAY_zDnI8HDSboGndxmQjoocIhAv4vCmYBcAbFbiBiZxx8ehp8z7TeuZFyn8zr2WZ5ifAaU-qsPzHNGzwICIvmRWlPAVz6WVi9tjABNAxHKNhQZuhDaUKYhtcq3jN79skaKUcpxsRYYUdaQwAUUKGV7N9NEHVtq9rqI_sFs7zOArgocKTt9afawsEi_vHYqlrESn6IjK7Rsulkh64lbBiXXuEn18GrCIqdzTR2w7HB2aVCJB0s9QFs6dt7N_vDxPXw0Nd04tmhThvNvWKrIq1XYwrK4q3erJ9fWH5K-Tu7Z_fbI5PytzcJDf2vfciwRrxRHnuZFuzAPcyt3AoeJspQlagKp4SSXY=&c=PpWHgE6d-yjRJ0LAudYV4iCklDH19C_upcYMYV2OqmXboEJVMXacng==&ch=E5FMzCj7ZzHbr6MD11NRvvKBcKkqY5MMJrH-IojPHtI6ZdKTcfr8_w==)
Friend, I need you to prove to me, my father, and Senator Cornyn that you're ready to fight back against the Far-Left.

I need you to show us that those insane headlines above are NOT representative of Texas.

**[Will you stand with John Cornyn as he fights back against Schumer and Hollywood elites trying to smear my family's good name and flip Texas blue?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pSc2UpYFb5fDAY_zDnI8HDSboGndxmQjoocIhAv4vCmYBcAbFbiBiZxx8ehp8z7TeuZFyn8zr2WZ5ifAaU-qsPzHNGzwICIvmRWlPAVz6WVi9tjABNAxHKNhQZuhDaUKYhtcq3jN79skaKUcpxsRYYUdaQwAUUKGV7N9NEHVtq9rqI_sFs7zOArgocKTt9afawsEi_vHYqlrESn6IjK7Rsulkh64lbBiXXuEn18GrCIqdzTR2w7HB2aVCJB0s9QFs6dt7N_vDxPXw0Nd04tmhThvNvWKrIq1XYwrK4q3erJ9fWH5K-Tu7Z_fbI5PytzcJDf2vfciwRrxRHnuZFuzAPcyt3AoeJspBpp9076fLSQ=&c=PpWHgE6d-yjRJ0LAudYV4iCklDH19C_upcYMYV2OqmXboEJVMXacng==&ch=E5FMzCj7ZzHbr6MD11NRvvKBcKkqY5MMJrH-IojPHtI6ZdKTcfr8_w==)**

\- Donald Trump Jr.

With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pSc2UpYFb5fDAY_zDnI8HDSboGndxmQjoocIhAv4vCmYBcAbFbiBiTYphCxuWl_-dxjVnxodaoP8hN0n_5F8BnzEv8PTozdTi3Z42FwoWvY4fEnsqKpsLkLASbW9mitkfvqlr_g7dxC4ivI6Ja__zLgviZ6sqedmxK6nRm7NqKM=&c=PpWHgE6d-yjRJ0LAudYV4iCklDH19C_upcYMYV2OqmXboEJVMXacng==&ch=E5FMzCj7ZzHbr6MD11NRvvKBcKkqY5MMJrH-IojPHtI6ZdKTcfr8_w==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pSc2UpYFb5fDAY_zDnI8HDSboGndxmQjoocIhAv4vCmYBcAbFbiBiZxx8ehp8z7TVJnJ0aW8MmIS78UO_rf1xOQhQZN7TwMo9TKYTM92iSA9FssQpf6QGyyd9zJVLoMDBO7S_F_ImJS-sMI-934Xe2fkt8tbJt3Z&c=PpWHgE6d-yjRJ0LAudYV4iCklDH19C_upcYMYV2OqmXboEJVMXacng==&ch=E5FMzCj7ZzHbr6MD11NRvvKBcKkqY5MMJrH-IojPHtI6ZdKTcfr8_w==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pSc2UpYFb5fDAY_zDnI8HDSboGndxmQjoocIhAv4vCmYBcAbFbiBiTYphCxuWl_-P5i_TUec0XN0EPEJLPecy-_CiHWHoE3uJnHmmCn0gEj0V7KRRnweX87xtEuEl1ZX7oQaYbKbhgJYhzDHTANBILZ7aCcDHHYFuf12-gC0nyNe89_smXmBbQ==&c=PpWHgE6d-yjRJ0LAudYV4iCklDH19C_upcYMYV2OqmXboEJVMXacng==&ch=E5FMzCj7ZzHbr6MD11NRvvKBcKkqY5MMJrH-IojPHtI6ZdKTcfr8_w==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pSc2UpYFb5fDAY_zDnI8HDSboGndxmQjoocIhAv4vCmYBcAbFbiBiR0tVkH0m589AGXxqfjZyagVbP6pfzhcfT60Hy1Pc5_8TtyR529uqklFpXIZKdhWwCSl9G8uLHaTVPjFX7W-KW2FrWDJNx-6eUil9DRb9ZWyE9And1Eur0W060hJYh4eNTsksMDHwTMWdHhtJ1coPtFKWTFKkJqpevnG3R0iGLbnFAdb9-MH1KKhxMugi_oRcxABpW_E8N4obzwqOuVKUZTMLoEuaE9hku7NIFf6RxgFZBKaHYUyjDMBxAj3-KdcPw==&c=PpWHgE6d-yjRJ0LAudYV4iCklDH19C_upcYMYV2OqmXboEJVMXacng==&ch=E5FMzCj7ZzHbr6MD11NRvvKBcKkqY5MMJrH-IojPHtI6ZdKTcfr8_w==) and find out exactly how you can help. name: GOP Notifications
subject: We need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ann Wagner for Congress
body:
Republicans across the country are being outraised by their liberal counterparts. Nancy Pelosi and her Socialist Squad are committed to keeping their majority in the House.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QJME6wZn5nuwbaf7WSc7si9-J5t-xYApGo_h5NYN-ilb2nNAuN1cM-FgqkUGF0FkLVns-2ejyHPK2q0vHS9APsIvjEWKLuuMi-_KvFHqrV4x5N1kyu11nYkeSK8IAua7igLYJ7wY9R9Rtyy3Ucv_CGsO4naiE8vR8OphbRGzCd27T9u2vsc-0yXKaPwqdTeUp-8ee4r1TnIjjlc8Wfj_O5JhXohxADERKlVVHLT8cmVNa2BT32yiPqijFSKErFc7g9P18fErLSCu2wDGhsUOLUDoOJXW4z7SkmrVoXjyUx0RvfbaMJz8-j8FKs8VrrZe89SqFyKbIrgb8l0KkrBjibtXdYeKST-BC35nP8Fon6SmkNjHK4HslbV-EeiitgcTepVIWEPu_RAZmTuHv8c7XQ==&c=SFi6fi3uMeP-gg8mnx8F7lr9uR0IeK5d0xqPxR3MEmhGbQ3sTqUkyw==&ch=5CIr5TDBnP_oVAMCvzfTRKJ5iAtWVVuP6KrwLaCugiC27IcqxjeS-A==)

Friend,

Republicans across the country are being outraised by their liberal counterparts.

Nancy Pelosi and her Socialist Squad are committed to keeping their majority in the House. Let's take a look at some of the ideas we have really received from the Democratic House majority:
1. Tax-payer funded witch hunt.
2. Late-term abortions.
3. The Green New Deal.
4. Medicare for All.
5. Free college for illegal immigrants.

... and so much more. As a nation, we cannot afford two more years of Pelosi and her Socialist Squad calling the shots.

We need your help supporting strong conservatives, like Ann Wagner, in Congress to help us ensure we take back the House for Republicans and defeat Pelosi and her Socialist Squad.

body:
they know it’s more crucial than ever that I get back to Washington to get results for Upstate New York JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP, KEVIN MCCARTHY, STEVE SCALISE, LIZ CHENEY, ELISE STEFANIK BY OFFICIALLY ENDORSING MY CAMPAIGN TODAY. [**ENDORSE CLAUDIA TENNEY NOW >>>**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=bd044e0067594edfa03fdd643982e70d&_e=nIUCNBHeamsEzkwLs5-v9J6-CHr3uzCHe911lwk68UNQB4hYrbzRgajKJeEf7GxaQb7GtADL9jlhd2XNWKZuqm9i1Gci35I3Z0t73tLRev2I6mvL8n32ZjSmH4uBDV_zquqe0fzywf9NX29ZACMbY3oOoGiJlzSxpayCwGZC4_xY_VVNTd3RCFQE4WT255ROhVI25zUB2G31WhYwwcCt6SpCKnjJwAtQzxRckNoC0FWqUzyQ47urDQy9HXzoF1GO-lmanok3CNecdfXvKFEG-lWdTrNCxqmbeHuLsHgC0sa5trp5Dq1-jq4i_53VIIedMh6VEmQLJwL6x9J5i62WQubgz34MJV4-OnvO085vAYOrkXUrW76o-cIDmqcZ2WghmC3JVSU1KFx1Z1E8uul5vA%3D%3D) [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=bd044e0067594edfa03fdd643982e70d&_e=nIUCNBHeamsEzkwLs5-v9J6-CHr3uzCHe911lwk68UNQB4hYrbzRgajKJeEf7GxaQb7GtADL9jlhd2XNWKZuqm9i1Gci35I3Z0t73tLRev2I6mvL8n32ZjSmH4uBDV_zquqe0fzywf9NX29ZACMbY3oOoGiJlzSxpayCwGZC4_xY_VVNTd3RCFQE4WT255ROEy_Ah4c02H1m5WG9xeMBw6FXsoz_ETPPDNOiEo9P77QeMu29zBTbg2HX1wlSmj6TcfFGwbynEDPrLZ879F3zT_EiNhZdvjawILvh_xHIMSI_JrtKZUKjL31D9-n3ACrGxBftkZetYWmPfdL1k7pPcerNgpjbZPo_nuv6xdpJEPuFpPb-d2oe--1mqwutsq5WJo9hWPBICgCYtyOeYgffqA%3D%3D) Peter, When I served in Congress previously, I had the honor of working with some amazing people. Alongside Republican leaders like Kevin McCarthy, Steve Scalize, Liz Cheney, Elise Stefanik, and President Donald Trump, I was able to deliver historic tax reform, dramatically reduce burdensome and unnecessary regulations, provide increased funding to Upstate New York’s military assets, and so much more. Now that I’m running to unseat liberal Anthony Brinidisi, every single one of these leaders have announced their support for my campaign. **President Trump and my colleagues in Congress have seen what we can do together, and they know it’s more crucial than ever that I get back to Washington to get results for Upstate New York.** Today, I am hoping that YOU will join them and the 100s of small business owners, grassroots activists, and conservative leaders who have endorsed my campaign. Will you add your name to my official list of supporters now? [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=bd044e0067594edfa03fdd643982e70d&_e=nIUCNBHeamsEzkwLs5-v9J6-CHr3uzCHe911lwk68UNQB4hYrbzRgajKJeEf7GxaQb7GtADL9jlhd2XNWKZuqm9i1Gci35I3Z0t73tLRev2I6mvL8n32ZjSmH4uBDV_zquqe0fzywf9NX29ZACMbY3oOoGiJlzSxpayCwGZC4_xY_VVNTd3RCFQE4WT255ROY0uJTZjlJpPew2FGz5mTVO1RK8qoGz3t119lG4Mm29em-X7hkOzTKgmpsxoy1Ri1ju_oBemJPwLxfiMptJV7pjZrTAmAC5z1tLcnMrNlb_7Hj453IszTjfAdGSEqoXj8imrez5Qki2e635KS_VMAjdbFPyREY_ikTqayk6TUreCqsJ-rjYfHZCMXH2l6wmcCXXeV7fyNCQRGBxYbk9aFIg%3D%3D) [**ADD YOUR NAME: ENDORSE CLAUDIA TENNEY NOW >>>**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=bd044e0067594edfa03fdd643982e70d&_e=nIUCNBHeamsEzkwLs5-v9J6-CHr3uzCHe911lwk68UNQB4hYrbzRgajKJeEf7GxaQb7GtADL9jlhd2XNWKZuqm9i1Gci35I3Z0t73tLRev2I6mvL8n32ZjSmH4uBDV_zquqe0fzywf9NX29ZACMbY3oOoGiJlzSxpayCwGZC4_xY_VVNTd3RCFQE4WT255ROGD18AENEAuxQ2lPB236p3Dl6kU4k66wZ13nHfci2nvw6jF3_COwAe4KwQtYXkAiKcbON7Zg6T5J9BuJjubguIKDby394UDbOiuSX4sQbNaFw50frXNtUoAEnQxBhX0e-Jv4OQsLS8bY5zZ2lrRYfX3p25wQCqPONhh5MMaCQOcq_qGqm4xMj7nTmdhTq8ZxF6VXipXvgr1NSqu-oDpw50w%3D%3D) Peter, it’s YOU the people who keep me going and keep me fighting for our home. Though Anthony Brindisi promised voters he would be a bipartisan voice for Upstate New York, the truth is, he’s been nothing but a puppet for a radical leftwing agenda that threatens everything we have. I want to get back to working FOR THE PEOPLE and heal America after this crisis. But I know I can’t do it without the grassroots support of voters like you, Peter. **Will you add your name today and OFFICIALLY endorse my campaign for Congress?: [https://claudiaforcongress.com/endorse/](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=bd044e0067594edfa03fdd643982e70d&_e=nIUCNBHeamsEzkwLs5-v9J6-CHr3uzCHe911lwk68UNQB4hYrbzRgajKJeEf7GxaQb7GtADL9jlhd2XNWKZuqm9i1Gci35I3Z0t73tLRev2I6mvL8n32ZjSmH4uBDV_zquqe0fzywf9NX29ZACMbY3oOoGiJlzSxpayCwGZC4_xY_VVNTd3RCFQE4WT255ROnzDgF98DLjHMavYxXShWfc3eOlq-taRVjWqjv6ZkCmdm7ihclbkPWFDawWY_Kd3VjvsVlyu7R1KXwzPE0SIkUctz9Jt5z8zoN9N3AN0LPfytg7QnLrnt8JrI7UvYPXj3nlrzPb5xenbVXAvelKh7NdRpcBExb0747sKlfLbrbnpVabyQnMeqGFbcYulI2GsrYpVFn0bZwtb7xxw7t_YR_A%3D%3D)** Thank you, Peter, and I appreciate your support. -Claudia |

body:
June 23rd is an important milestone for our campaign and Kentucky. A record number of primary voters will vote by mail in this election.

| We’re one month out from the Kentucky primary election, friends. Our campaign is committed to do our part to help educate and turn out voters across the district, from Lexington to Fleming County, to ensure that Kentucky’s election on June 23rd is safe and successful for everyone. And while we are fortunate to have an incredible team of volunteers on this campaign, we do need to invest in postcards, mailers, and digital organizing software. **[_Can you chip in right now to support our Primary Election Voter Education Fund?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17604855/199962419/1003843848?refcode=20200523_em_fr_onemonthout_all_l1_atest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTdiNmJjOS0yOTlkLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6sEiwiljGJOHVYHhKRxo8x7l4H5CZFbxZRD3iOfxev8=) Here’s what we plan to do:**
* Use our digital organizing program to spread the word about the upcoming election through social media and texting
* Communicate via postcards and handwritten notes to educate voters about voting by mail — deadlines, how to fill out your ballot, and more
* Expand our virtual phonebanking program to mobilize Democratic primary voters in every one of the 19 counties across the Sixth District

Our primary plan will allow us to do two things: **First** , a record number of primary voters will vote by mail in this election. We want to make sure folks are informed, know who Josh is, and send their ballots back to have their vote counted. **Second** , we want to find out what works and where we need to make improvements as we take on Andy Barr and Mitch McConnell’s dark money machine in November. Just this week, a poll showed Democrats making real gains in the 6th District. We can win, and we’re executing the strategy to do so right now. **But we need your help.[_If you’re able, chip in $10 or $20 to help support our Voter Education Fund._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17604856/199962420/1003843848?refcode=20200523_em_fr_onemonthout_all_l2_atest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTdiNmJjOS0yOTlkLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6sEiwiljGJOHVYHhKRxo8x7l4H5CZFbxZRD3iOfxev8=)**

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: how we can help our heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Our men and women in uniform make the kind of sacrifices we have been seeing from civilians during the COVID-19 pandemic every single day. | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

Since the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic, we’ve seen incredible stories of resilience, sacrifice, and volunteerism from every single part of our state.

We’ve made it our mission to share them with you weekly through the hashtag #INThisTogether. But this week, we’re doing it a little bit differently.

**Memorial Day is this weekend and Hoosiers all over our state are honoring our fallen heroes and those who have chosen to serve in the United States Armed Forces.**

Our men and women in uniform make the kind of sacrifices we have been seeing from civilians during the COVID-19 pandemic **every single day.**

Sacrifice, heroism, and bravery are just part of their everyday routine.

_In honor of Memorial Day, we want to show our heroes that we’re always #INThisTogether, not just during a pandemic. Many veterans are struggling right now in the face of COVID-19 and we want to take some time this holiday weekend to show them we have their backs, no matter what._

If you want to make a big difference for our heroes this Memorial Day, please consider supporting any of the charities below.
[**Hoosier Veterans Assistance Foundation**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=4329b08bfca44ecb958d047032ca5c6c&_e=WHrwNQAz7qpKw57GoQcJnn1cZ50Xi_ZKloxj6MoScAYvZ-eUxBU8ufebsm8ccrBIYXni5wiuiHDgt2xaJrRvIGWapzhdzDRVkvFTF8J3Gvc2r8Us7xT35QpjLYolIpcXVsICkiauD14IDzwIVk4Nk7fPkz1lY4S2ldMlgqg2B_YNgXZzJsYR0HMI6pgnNz1IhvJkv_zn78k3rSRhRGMdLHxbCdd5oePCCSG6NkEJVp_Nq0UXLo4uU_y082TJhaAUD2pzNms5uvJuZ05r45dxEqPSUzql7lUYK4f4UKoYLRoEJRYyd_3RB0wJn0M-dG8koA-j6Mp-yvqnAKF5lMlSVAYgkfzLXj7wdYUPkxkHd6WLmeW9gmgZca0aMglJuMx6)

[**Disabled American Veterans**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=4329b08bfca44ecb958d047032ca5c6c&_e=WHrwNQAz7qpKw57GoQcJnrHz2O-OG1D_KlkFTNJ4l2MVZwE0mPpews9W-kHo-N1nu7EJGPsj1UrXeLkpllShqBUtCEbP3ePNdAYHLW9W833A1c2c8RAyWpUihyqz6C3R_r_4R-UZXuejZQtwgEpBlSnoZZcSfeXeGXeHogsPkP_81dlgd9fIPwqluvyzKN86xlCctRSb06qU7p526sXD_bv4ZObU7eNKt6X4Fbuz5TvEjGQ3S1KzG-pOJhxE_BPYa5iPW7YJysy5HThzgMczLFllD2oyMTpAi2jvpJ3EaAK5JXfNCp49cbZqIfE7KIRyuFNjd4CpEUMbabpAGC2oa5KxlEOqzAkjbxBscfjqlZ_G-n0KbH3VbkmYOE-5XjyJ)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: keeping you updated on my recent work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/tZrmv86oR-gG7YN3dGPzNDIxUl6euOzOd5iyoWDkOyQ=?refcode=AS.5.23)
---
| Peter, I hope you and your family are staying healthy and safe. I'm writing today to give you a brief update on what I've been working on this month. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/U4fV_Sb4Xm1-jM70uD1HkggUlv0FIcTl_SA_2-ur1jk=) [_**Expanding Broadband Infrastructure**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/U4fV_Sb4Xm1-jM70uD1HkggUlv0FIcTl_SA_2-ur1jk=) One issue that unites Democrats and Republicans in the rural counties of central Virginia is the **need for fast, affordable broadband services,** especially during the COVID-19 pandemic. I'm focused on procuring results for the people of VA-07 which means **pushing for real, bipartisan solutions.** **I 've led an effort of more than 70 Representatives -- Democrats and Republicans -- from across the country** calling for a historic investment in expanding our nation's broadband infrastructure. We are all adapting to this crisis, and there is no singular, direct path forward. But **the only way we 're going to address our challenges is by working together. ** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/JZlA9GZAksV9hFvquK0uEGPrHU4zB35T5L4bnagPxDM=) [_**IRS Customer Service**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/imAX8KGr3PaeUiTcN8V-hRZ-flJhZajkFn46y6NrSao=) I've heard from hundreds of Central Virginians expressing frustration that they've been unable to reach Internal Revenue Service (IRS) customer service representatives to ask important questions. Earlier this month, **I led a multi-member effort calling on the IRS to improve their customer service for taxpayers with questions about their stimulus checks.** **On Monday, the IRS announced it will add 3,500 telephone operators** to answer Americans' questions about the status of their stimulus checks. I'm encouraged by this development, but I'll keep pressing the IRS to improve its telework capabilities and provide faster answers to Central Virginians. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/rOMSU8-vxEoL2BRfEEF7gNnSLdqoDqOygEWys4gY698=) _[**Nursing Homes**](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/rOMSU8-vxEoL2BRfEEF7gNnSLdqoDqOygEWys4gY698=)_ Here in Central Virginia, we've seen the devastating and fatal effects of COVID-19 on residents of nursing homes and long-term care facilities. As these facilities and their staff struggle on the front lines to care for the most vulnerable people in our communities, **it is unacceptable that the support they need has been so delayed. **
I've led multiple efforts calling for **more funding and better supply distribution** at nursing homes and long-term care facilities for weeks. The facilities need testing supplies, personal protective gear and staff support, and the American people need clarity on what supply distribution issues or decision-making processes have caused delays. **I promise to keep pushing the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services to provide answers and deliver long overdue support.** We can't keep losing our neighbors this way. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/-VlrYZ27jDn3DfXdpPO9H5e3b_et-JmXt-N4yDQ2X2w=) [_**Lugar Bipartisanship Ranking**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/-VlrYZ27jDn3DfXdpPO9H5e3b_et-JmXt-N4yDQ2X2w=)
The Lugar Center has released its annual ranking of legislators, based on their commitment to coalition-building and bipartisanship. I am proud to be ranked as: **The 5th most bipartisan House Democrat** and the **most bipartisan Member of the Virginia delegation.**
The bipartisan index measures how often House Members introduce bills that succeed in attracting cosponsors from the opposite political party and how often they cosponsor a bill introduced by a Member of the other party. **I am proud to have a bipartisanship score that demonstrates my strong commitment to working across the aisle on legislative solutions that can expand opportunity for all Central Virginians.** Thank you for supporting my campaign. Although we can't be together right now, **please connect with me on my campaign _[Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/LtuUlA1bcP0afBLykLT4aotc1HyVUACPFsgU-MaC6OY=)_ and _[Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/gq1WeWNc4HwwVwac4_T5b12LKQgFyu9FHbx50t0TZ08=)_ pages** -- that's where you'll find the most up-to-date information. If you would like to get involved in my campaign, please visit my [_**campaign website.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/AXUb4fV44bIDAyt2ZWlWhf_uWhqYwpF9Vm9dLaiTZjc=)
---
Thank you,

_Abigail_

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/tZrmv86oR-gG7YN3dGPzNDIxUl6euOzOd5iyoWDkOyQ=?refcode=AS.5.23)

---
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/ZMpZTWb5L0SnJHxv0_yBRXcv_5SVRx3PWGF8gz_6pkU=).
| [DONATE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/euG7d-CMRHQnH9qvR-NbZGhG5vzHPB6EEu7dWTp4lF8=/tZrmv86oR-gG7YN3dGPzNDIxUl6euOzOd5iyoWDkOyQ=?refcode=AS.5.23)

name: Team Warner
subject: Your Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d496/53d9897e/5499a4d5/1c887692/2015385722/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

Team Warner hopes that you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy. We will continue to send weekly updates to keep folks around the Commonwealth up to date with what Mark Warner is working on in the Senate to get Virginians the help they need during this difficult time.

**Here 's just some of what Mark is working on this week: **
* Mark introduced his _Paycheck Security Act_ **[to cover the cost of paychecks and benefits for workers who have been laid off or furloughed](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d496/53d9897e/5499a4d5/1c887691/2015385722/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/sen-mark-warner-joins-senate-democrats-introducing-paycheck-security-act/")** as a result of the coronavirus pandemic. Right now, that's more than 39 million Americans, a rate that rivals the Great Depression. This bill would not only cover payroll expenses, it would reconnect people with critical benefits, like health insurance.

* Earlier this week, the United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) accepted Mark and Tim Kaine's petition to **[include Virginia in a pilot program to modernize Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefits](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d496/53d9897e/5499a4d5/1c887690/2015385722/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.nbc29.com/2020/05/21/virginia-now-part-snap-online-purchasing-pilot-program/")**. This will expand access to food for families across the Commonwealth.

* Following up on expanded SNAP benefits, Mark and Tim Kaine co-sponsored legislation **[to allow those receiving SNAP benefits to get their food from restaurants](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d496/53d9897e/5499a4d5/1c88769f/2015385722/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.richmond.com/news/virginia/kaine-warner-co-sponsor-bill-aimed-at-helping-snap-recipients-restaurants/article_f585d3d1-2574-59b9-9baf-52a74db962ed.html")**. Their bill, the _COVID-19 Anti-Hunger Restaurant Relief for You Act of 2020_ , or the _SNAP CARRY Act_ , would decrease food insecurity while giving local restaurants that opt in support during this challenging time.

* Mark joined a bi-partisan group of senators in urging Senate leadership to increase support for first responders in the next coronavirus relief package. Their proposal would bridge the gap in paid sick leave for first responders and provide hazard pay for federal firefighters, among other initiatives.

* Mark and a bi-partisan group of senators are working hard to make sure that our **[coal miners have adequate protection](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d496/53d9897e/5499a4d5/1c88769e/2015385722/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wwlp.com/washington-dc/group-of-senators-push-for-legislation-to-protect-coal-miners-during-pandemic/")** during this outbreak. Mining is already a dangerous job, and Mark is committed to making sure that miners have the safeguards they need during the coronavirus pandemic.

* Mark **[spoke with local leaders in Southwest Virginia](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d496/53d9897e/5499a4d5/1c88769d/2015385722/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.swvatoday.com/news/article_18d2c9a0-9add-11ea-9c5f-abe6ca4f4ccd.html")** about the impact of coronavirus in their communities. He is committed to making sure that any relief packages from the Senate adequately address challenges faced by communities across the Commonwealth.

As our country faces this challenging time, Mark is committed to rolling up his sleeves and working until every American has access to the information and resources they need. On behalf of our entire team, we thank you for your support -- you are what keeps us going!

-- Team Warner
|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d496/53d9897e/5499a4d5/1c88769c/2015385722/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com") Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d496/53d9897e/5499a4d5/1c88769b/2015385722/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

subject: You're invited! Virtual Meet and Greet with Malcolm Kenyatta and Dani Brzozowski
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fc7a3082b2bc/youre-invited-virtual-meet-and-greet-with-malcolm-kenyatta-and-dani-brzozowski?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
We are honored to invite you to join Pennsylvania State Representative and progressive champion Malcolm Kenyatta as he hosts Dani Brzozowski at a virtual house party next Friday, May 29th at 6:30 pm CST/7:30 EST. Hear Malcolm explain just how crucial it is to flip these remaining** Red to Blue seats **and fight for strong Democratic representation up and down the ballot!
---
| [RSVP here!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f2f834ca61&e=140a9b81e7 "RSVP here!")
---
| Having Rep. Kenyatta join us for this event is a real honor. He made national waves this last week with [his rousing speech on the Pennsylvania House floor](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f58192d033&e=140a9b81e7) in support of working families during this crisis. **Rep. Kenyatta has spent his time in office fighting for our shared values, and he supports Dani because he knows she will fight for them in Congress.**

We hope to see you there!

Team Dani
---
| [Click here to join Malcolm on the 29th](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=941c6eb5d1&e=140a9b81e7 "Click here to join Malcolm on the 29th")

name: Team Hern
subject: A PERFECT score!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Kevin just received a rare honor from the Council for Citizens Against Government Waste! Learn more >>
Peter, We have some fantastic news! The Council for Citizens Against Government Waste (CCAGW) just released their 2019 Congressional Ratings, and Kevin was given the highest honor of being a Taxpayer Super Hero.
Only 27 of 435 Representatives received a score of 100, and Kevin was one of them. It really highlights his commitment to protecting taxpayer dollars, and spending your money wisely and efficiently. Kevin doesn’t believe in frivolous spending, and will always fight to protect your rights and keep the government small. Find out where other legislators placed by **[visiting CAGW's website](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/7f6914d8ee4abf20/3fcda1b9e8d00668c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**. If you want to keep up on the latest about how Kevin and our whole team is responsibly serving you in Washington, follow our Facebook page by **[clicking or tapping HERE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/7f6914d8ee4abf20/05372b2b537d3498c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**. We’re glad you’re here, and we’re looking forward to seeing you on social media! Thanks,
Team Hern _P.S. Don’t forget to forward this email to your friends and family and let them know not all politicians are spend-happy with other people’s hard-earned dollars!_ | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/7f6914d8ee4abf20/d7fedd0ab683c8abc3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/7f6914d8ee4abf20/bb010cba67268720c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

| | Hello,

When I first moved to Denver in 1997, I met an up and coming brewpub owner named John Hickenlooper.

Twenty-three years later, John is running for the United States Senate in a hotly contested race against Republican Cory Gardner.

[It’s critical that we beat Donald Trump in November – but that's not enough. We also must take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell to pass the progressive legislation we need to put our country back on the right track.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17606499/200047043/1791661745?refcode=EM_FR_B1_052320_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTRiZDZlZC01MjlkLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sWHqZUwRVSgjNyYtFakBEdAEq3xiAeXHxNdbjszC3XA=)

As both Mayor of Denver and Governor of Colorado, John put Colorado on a path toward progress. He expanded Medicaid, signed gun background checks into law, and passed bipartisan economic development legislation for rural parts of our state.

Having worked alongside John for more than 20 years, I have no doubt that he will make an excellent Senator for Colorado — [but he needs our help.

Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party are prepared to spend whatever it takes to keep John from winning this election. We can't let that happen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17606501/200047045/1791661745?refcode=EM_FR_B1_052320_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTRiZDZlZC01MjlkLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sWHqZUwRVSgjNyYtFakBEdAEq3xiAeXHxNdbjszC3XA=)

name: Hegar, MJ
subject: Senator Cornyn's tweets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Again and again when Sen. Cornyn tweets about COVID-19, he makes light of it or downplays it.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890052/7f51f7bc/4e7f0dc1/4ef6a7ce/2926904934/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890052/7f51f7bc/4e7f0dc1/4ef6a7cd/2926904934/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200523.2nd__1443__&amount=10")
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890052/7f51f7bc/4e7f0dc1/4ef6a7cd/2926904934/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200523.2nd__1443__&amount=10")**
Have you seen Sen. Cornyn's tweets, Peter? No matter how many COVID-19 patients had pre-existing conditions, they ALL deserve a senator who cares about their well-being.

His comments are especially appalling since he's voted TWENTY TIMES to repeal the Affordable Care Act, repeatedly voted to gut pre-existing condition protections, and even now he's standing aside as a lawsuit threatens to rip away protections for people with pre-existing conditions!

**[Pitch in to help me beat Sen.
